_meta.query: best wireless earbuds under 3000 for gym
_meta.note: High-fidelity recorded pipeline output. Replace with a fresh capture via `python -m evals.online.record` after a real run. Replayed deterministically in CI (no API calls) to keep retrieval_quality + explanation_integrity honest against real-shaped LLM output.
_meta.source_excerpt: Across r/IndianGaming, r/headphones and r/budgetaudiophile the Boult Audio Astra and Realme Buds Air 5 dominate the under-3000 gym bracket. Users repeatedly praise the Astra's secure ear-hook fit and IPX5 sweat resistance for running; the main complaint is an overly bass-heavy default tuning. The Realme Buds Air 5 wins on battery (38h with case) and low-latency game mode, though several users note the touch controls are oversensitive. The Nothing Ear (a) is praised for cleaner sound and ANC but a few runners say the stem fit loosens during intense workouts.

scored_products.name: Boult Audio Astra
praise: ear-hook design stays locked in during runs
IPX5 sweat resistance survived months of gym use
punchy bass that makes workouts feel energetic

complaints.text: default tuning is too bass-heavy for vocals
